scenarios.name: JWT-protected v1 group with Locals
scenarios.rationale: Baseline covers Fiber basics but often skips c.Locals for downstream handlers; treatment follows the skill's pattern of c.Get + c.Locals + app.Group with middleware injected at group level.

scenarios.name: Production hardening with built-in middleware
scenarios.rationale: Baseline cites rate-limit and CORS but typically misses BodyLimit in fiber.Config and ShutdownWithTimeout; treatment wires recover/logger/cors/limiter via the documented imports and sets Config/Shutdown correctly.
